title: Woven Leather Belt
description: Fabric: Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather with woven detailing — develops a beautiful patina over time. Fit notes: One-size-adjustable with multiple holes; sits best at the natural waist or hips. Works with waist sizes 24–34". Style: Elevated casual to smart casual. The woven texture adds interest without being loud — equally at home with denim or tailored trousers. Works well for: All body types. Cinching at the waist is especially flattering for hourglass and pear silhouettes. Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans, Wide Leg Trousers, Pleated Midi Skirt. Tuck in any of our blouses for a polished finish.

title: Cashmere Blend Scarf
description: Fabric: 70% cashmere, 30% merino wool — exceptionally soft with a slight drape, warm without bulk. Hand wash cold. Fit notes: Generously sized (70" × 14") — wraps, drapes, or tucks depending on your mood. Lightweight enough to wear indoors. Style: Quiet luxury. Looks expensive because it is. Versatile enough for a coffee run or a dinner out. Works well for: All body types. Draped open it elongates; wrapped it adds softness around the face. Pairs with: Structured Blazer, Belted Trench Coat, Oversized Knit Sweater. Choose a tonal colour for a polished layered look.

title: Structured Fedora
description: Material: 100% wool felt body with a grosgrain ribbon band. Holds its shape beautifully; spot clean only. Fit notes: Medium brim (2.5"). Available in S/M and L/XL. Measure head circumference — S/M fits 54–57cm, L/XL fits 57–60cm. Style: The kind of hat that makes an outfit. Adds instant intention to even the simplest look — jeans and a tee become a whole moment. Works well for: Oval, heart, and diamond face shapes. The structured brim balances softer features beautifully. Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans + Satin Wrap Blouse for elevated casual. Also great over the Belted Trench Coat.

title: Gold Chain Necklace
description: Material: 18k gold-plated brass, tarnish-resistant. 18" chain with lobster clasp. Nickel-free. Fit notes: 18" length sits just below the collarbone — the most universally flattering length for layering or wearing alone. Style: Clean, modern, and quietly elevated. Substantial enough to stand alone; refined enough to layer with the Pearl Drop Earrings. Works well for: All necklines. Especially beautiful with V-necks, wrap styles, and wide scoops. Pairs with: Satin Wrap Blouse, Adjustable Strap Cami, Jersey Wrap Dress. Layer with delicate pieces or wear alone for a cleaner look.

title: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Material: Freshwater pearl drops (8mm) on 14k gold-filled ear wire. Hypoallergenic. 1.2" total drop. Fit notes: A 1.2" drop — noticeable without being heavy. Lightweight enough for all-day wear. Style: The earring that bridges casual and dressed-up effortlessly. Not your grandmother's pearls — these feel modern and intentional. Works well for: All face shapes. The gentle drop elongates the neck — especially flattering for rounder face shapes. Pairs with: Satin Wrap Blouse, Floral Midi Dress, Jersey Wrap Dress. Beautiful with the Gold Chain Necklace for a tonal fine jewellery look.

title: Satin Wrap Blouse
description: Fabric: 95% polyester satin, 5% elastane — the kind that reads as silk. Fluid drape, wrinkle-resistant, easy care. Fit notes: Adjustable self-tie wrap — accommodates a range of sizes in one. The surplice neckline creates a natural V. Runs slightly generous; size down if between sizes. Style: The most versatile top in the shop. Takes you from a work meeting to dinner without changing. Available in Black, Ivory, and Dusty Rose. Works well for: Especially flattering for hourglass and pear silhouettes — the wrap ties at the narrowest point. The V-neck elongates the torso for petite frames too. Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans (tuck it in), Wide Leg Trousers, Pleated Midi Skirt. Finish with Gold Chain Necklace and Ankle Boots.

title: Classic Rib Tee
description: Fabric: 95% cotton, 5% elastane ribbed jersey — substantial weight that holds its shape wash after wash. Not see-through. Fit notes: Semi-fitted with gentle stretch. Hits just at or slightly below the hip. True to size. The ribbing adds structure without clinging. Style: The perfect foundation piece. Looks intentional whether tucked, half-tucked, or worn loose. Available in Black, White, and Navy. Works well for: All body types. The semi-fitted cut skims without hugging — comfortable for straighter and curvier silhouettes alike. Pairs with: Everything. Start here: High Rise Straight Jeans + Woven Leather Belt + Ankle Boots. Or under the Structured Blazer for office wear.

title: Oversized Knit Sweater
description: Fabric: 60% wool, 30% alpaca, 10% nylon — genuinely warm, incredibly soft, minimal pill. Dry clean or hand wash cold. Fit notes: Intentionally oversized — sized in S/M and L/XL rather than individual sizes. Drop shoulders, relaxed through the body. Wear it big or tuck the front. Style: The sweater you reach for constantly. Cosy without looking sloppy. Available in Cream, Camel, and Charcoal. Works well for: All body types. The oversized silhouette is especially flattering paired with something slim on the bottom — balances any proportions. Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans (half-tuck, straight leg showing) for the classic proportioned look. Also great over the Pleated Midi Skirt with Ankle Boots.

title: High Rise Straight Jeans
description: Fabric: 98% cotton, 2% elastane — a substantial denim with just enough give to feel comfortable all day without losing shape. Mid-weight, not stiff. Fit notes: High-rise waist (10.5" rise), slim through hip and thigh, straight leg from knee to hem. Ankle-length on a 5'7" frame. True to size — size up one if you're between sizes or have curvier hips. Style: The straight-leg silhouette that works with everything. Not trendy in a way that dates — genuinely a wardrobe foundation. Available in Indigo Wash, Light Blue, and Black. Works well for: The high rise is universally flattering — elongates the torso and defines the waist. Especially good for pear and hourglass silhouettes. Petite frames: the ankle length keeps proportions clean. Pairs with: Satin Wrap Blouse (tucked), Classic Rib Tee (half-tuck), Oversized Knit Sweater. Finish with Ankle Boots and a Woven Leather Belt.

title: Wide Leg Trousers
description: Fabric: 72% polyester, 24% viscose, 4% elastane — a suiting-weight fabric with beautiful drape and structure. Wrinkle-resistant, fully lined. Fit notes: High-rise waist with a wide, relaxed leg from hip to hem. The volume is in the leg, not the waist — sits cleanly at the top. True to size. Style: Elevated and intentional. These read as tailored even in a casual context. Available in Black, Tan, and Burgundy. Works well for: Most flattering on taller frames (5'6"+) where the full leg length reads as dramatic. Petite frames: pair with a heel to maintain the long-line silhouette. Straight and rectangular body types especially benefit from the volume and movement. Pairs with: Adjustable Strap Cami tucked in (minimal and chic), Satin Wrap Blouse, or Oversized Knit Sweater for a volume-on-volume look that works when proportioned right.

title: Floral Midi Dress
description: Fabric: 100% viscose — lightweight, breathable, and beautifully fluid. Moves with you. Hand wash cold or dry clean. Fit notes: V-neck, fitted through the bodice with a flowing midi skirt. Falls mid-calf on a 5'7" frame. The floral print runs in a smaller repeat — not overwhelming. Available in Floral Print and Solid Black. Style: The dress that does the work. Wears as easily to a garden party as it does to a summer dinner. The Solid Black version is a surprising amount of fun — the cut and fabric elevate it beyond a basic. Works well for: The V-neck and fitted bodice are especially flattering for hourglass silhouettes. The fluid midi length works beautifully for pear shapes — skims rather than clings. Petite note: the midi length can overwhelm; a small heel keeps proportions balanced. Pairs with: Leather Mule (Cream or Tan), Woven Leather Belt at the waist, Gold Chain Necklace. Keep accessories minimal — the dress is the story.

title: Jersey Wrap Dress
description: Fabric: 92% modal, 8% elastane jersey — impossibly soft, slightly matte finish, holds its shape. The kind of fabric that feels like a second skin in the best way. Machine wash cold. Fit notes: True wrap with adjustable tie — works across a range of sizes. The jersey has stretch so it accommodates curves generously. Falls just below the knee on a 5'7" frame. Available in Black, Navy, and Merlot. Style: Equal parts comfort and elegance. Women reach for this on days when they want to look put-together without thinking about it. The Merlot is particularly striking. Works well for: This is the dress we most often recommend for hourglass and pear silhouettes — the wrap emphasizes the waist and skims the hips beautifully. Also very wearable for straight silhouettes where the wrap creates shape. Pairs with: Ankle Boot (Black or Wine), Pearl Drop Earrings, Cashmere Blend Scarf in cooler months. For summer: Leather Mule and Gold Chain Necklace.

title: Structured Blazer
description: Fabric: 65% polyester, 30% viscose, 5% elastane suiting — holds structure through a full day without stiffness. Fully lined. Dry clean recommended. Fit notes: Single-button closure, notched lapel, two front pockets. Fitted through the shoulder and chest, slightly relaxed at the hip. True to size — size up if you plan to layer a sweater underneath. Style: The piece that makes everything else look more intentional. Throw it over jeans and a tee and you're dressed. Available in Black, Plaid Check, and Cream. Works well for: The structured shoulder creates width — excellent for pear silhouettes. The single-button closure hits at the natural waist and elongates the legs. Works for all heights; petite frames should keep the hem hem short (it hits at hip on most frames). Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans + Classic Rib Tee for smart casual. Wide Leg Trousers for a full suiting moment. Or over the Jersey Wrap Dress as an evening layer.

title: Denim Jacket
description: Fabric: 100% cotton rigid denim, 12oz weight — the kind that feels stiff at first and becomes perfectly broken-in. Not stretchy; size up one for a relaxed fit. Fit notes: Classic trucker silhouette — hits at the hip, slightly cropped. Size up one for a relaxed/oversized look, true to size for fitted. Available in Light Blue and Black Wash. Style: A wardrobe perennial. Looks just as right in year five as it did on day one. The Black Wash reads more elevated; the Light Blue leans classic. Works well for: The cropped hem is naturally flattering for petite frames — keeps the silhouette proportioned. For taller or curvier frames, sizing up gives a more relaxed, contemporary feel. Pairs with: Floral Midi Dress (denim over floral is a whole look), Pleated Midi Skirt + Classic Rib Tee, or Ribbed Mini Dress for a casual off-duty outfit.

title: Ankle Boot
description: Material: Full-grain leather upper, leather-lined, stacked block heel (2.5"), almond toe. Resoleable. Available in Black, Tan, and Wine. Fit notes: True to size. The block heel adds height without sacrificing stability — genuinely wearable for a full day. The almond toe is elongating without being pointed. Style: The boot that anchors a wardrobe. The Wine colour is an unexpected neutral that works with more than you'd think — navy, camel, black, and olive all love it. Works well for: The 2.5" block heel is excellent for petite frames — adds height while keeping the look grounded. The ankle cut elongates the leg when worn with ankle-grazing hemlines. Pairs with: High Rise Straight Jeans (ankle-length hem + boot = the ideal proportion), Jersey Wrap Dress, Pleated Midi Skirt. Nearly everything, honestly.

title: Leather Mule
description: Material: Nappa leather upper, leather insole, 1" stacked heel. Backless slip-on. Available in Cream, Black. Fit notes: True to size. The low heel and wide toe box make these genuinely comfortable for extended wear. The backless design means they're easy on/off without compromising fit. Style: Effortless and grown-up. The Cream is the more interesting choice — works as a neutral that elevates rather than blends in. Works well for: Great for all heights. The low heel keeps proportions easy across different hemlines. The clean silhouette is particularly elegant with wide-leg styles. Pairs with: Wide Leg Trousers (Tan or Black), Floral Midi Dress, Pleated Midi Skirt. The Cream mule with the Champagne Pleated Midi Skirt is especially beautiful.

title: Adjustable Strap Cami
description: Fabric: 95% modal, 5% elastane — satin-finish modal that feels cool against the skin and drapes beautifully. More substantial than it looks; not see-through. Machine wash cold. Fit notes: Adjustable spaghetti straps, slight stretch, skims the body without clinging. Falls just below the hip. True to size. Available in Black, White, and Nude. Style: The Swiss Army knife of tops. Wear alone, layer under a blazer, or tuck into a high-waisted skirt. The Nude is especially versatile — disappears under sheer layers. Works well for: The adjustable straps mean the length and neckline work across a range of torso lengths. Great layering piece for all body types. Pairs with: Wide Leg Trousers (tucked in, minimal and sleek), Structured Blazer as a layer, or Pleated Midi Skirt with Ankle Boots for an evening look.

title: Ribbed Mini Dress
description: Fabric: 65% viscose, 30% nylon, 5% elastane ribbed knit — more structure than a typical jersey, holds its shape, has a slight body-con quality without being tight. Machine wash cold. Fit notes: Fitted through the body with enough stretch to be comfortable. Hem hits mid-thigh on a 5'7" frame. Scoop neck. True to size — the ribbing has stretch so it accommodates curves well. Style: Casual confidence. This is the dress you wear when you want to look like you made zero effort and every effort simultaneously. Available in Black, Brown, and Maroon. Works well for: Most flattering for straight and athletic silhouettes where the fitted rib creates definition. Curvier silhouettes: the stretch accommodates beautifully; the scoop neck keeps it balanced at the top. Pairs with: Ankle Boots (Black or Wine) and a Structured Blazer thrown over for a night out. Denim Jacket for daytime. Gold Chain Necklace keeps accessories simple.

title: Pleated Midi Skirt
description: Fabric: 100% polyester satin-back crepe — substantial, fluid, and beautifully pleated from the waist. Moves like silk. Fully lined. Machine wash gentle. Fit notes: Elasticated waistband (very comfortable), full pleated volume from hip to hem. Midi length falls mid-calf on a 5'7" frame. One size up if you're between sizes. Available in Black, Champagne, and Olive. Style: Effortlessly elegant. The pleating means it looks dressed-up with minimal effort. The Champagne is the surprise favourite — it's the kind of colour that photographs beautifully and feels special in person. Works well for: The flowing midi is universally flattering — skims over hips and thighs without defining them. The elasticated waist is comfortable for all body types. Petite note: pair with a heel to prevent the hem from overwhelming the frame. Pairs with: Satin Wrap Blouse (tucked) + Ankle Boots for dressed-up casual. Oversized Knit Sweater + Leather Mule for a relaxed elevated look. The Champagne skirt + Adjustable Strap Cami (Nude) + Pearl Drop Earrings is a complete outfit that takes minutes.

title: Belted Trench Coat
description: Fabric: 65% cotton, 35% polyester gabardine — the traditional trench fabric. Wind-resistant, shower-proof (not waterproof), and gets better with age. Fully lined in acetate. Dry clean. Fit notes: Double-breasted, belted waist, storm flap, shoulder epaulettes. The belt cinches to create shape or leave open for a relaxed silhouette. True to size. Available in Camel, Black, and Beige. Style: One of the best investments in outerwear. The Camel is the classic; the Black is the modern choice that works year-round. This is the coat that pulls every outfit together. Works well for: The belted waist is universally flattering — creates shape on straight silhouettes, emphasizes the waist on hourglass and pear shapes. The mid-thigh length is proportioned for most heights; petite frames can leave the belt open for a longer, leaner line. Pairs with: Everything — that's the point. Classic: High Rise Straight Jeans + Classic Rib Tee + Ankle Boots underneath. Evening: over the Jersey Wrap Dress. Weekend: over the Oversized Knit Sweater + jeans with a Cashmere Blend Scarf.
